title: VDIAGTOOL VD30 Pro OBD2 Scanner, Car Diagnostic Tool for EOBD Cars, Fault Code Reader for OBD II Reset, OBD Scanner Live Data, Check Engine Light Error, I/M Readiness for All OBDII Protocol Vehicles
features: Note: VDIAGTOOL VD30 Pro OBD2 code reader only support full obd2 functions and simple battery voltage test . NOT SUPPORTED Battery/ABS/Airbag/SRS/TPMS Codes and 24V DIESEL VEHICLES, please check carefully before you buying.

All-in-One Obd2 Scanner - Comprehensive OBD2 Functions,the VD30pro obd2 scanner diagnostic tool can read/clear diagnostic fault codes, reset check engine lights (MIL), stream live sensor data, check I/M readiness, retrieve VIN, test O₂ sensors, freeze frame analysis, and access 98,563+ DTC library – plus battery voltage testing & report printing

Extensive Vehicle Compatibility - Vdiagtool VD30 Pro car diagnostic tool supports all 16PIN vehicles compliant with OBDII protocols (KWP2000, ISO9141, J1850 VPW/PWM, CAN) across US (1996+), EU (2001+), and Asian cars, SUVs & light trucks, including newer CAN-equipped models, check compatibility with your vehicle model before purchasing.

Extreme-Duty Diagnostics ​- VD30pro Car diagnostic scanner Engineered with next-generation processing chips and reinforced impact-resistant structure to ensure rapid, consistent diagnostics in extreme conditions—from sub-zero winters and desert heat to dusty repair shops or accidental drops—without compromising scanning speed or accuracy

Beginner-Friendly Operation - 2.8-inch TFT color screen with intuitive icons displays all diagnostic data at a glance. VD30pro Car code reader Supports 8 languages & plug-and-play power via OBDII port—no batteries, chargers, or complex setup required

VDIAGTOOL Assurance - VD30 Pro car fault coder reader Backed by a 2-year warranty & lifetime free software updates (via included USB cable) and year-round technical support. Contact our expert team 24/7 for troubleshooting
description: Product Description Professional Car OBD2 Scanner Diagnostic Tool Check Engine Fault Code Reader Stop guessing about check engine lights! Our OBD2 diagnostic tool instantly reads error codes, tells you what's wrong, and helps decide if you need a mechanic. Save hundreds on unnecessary repairs - just plug in and diagnose in seconds. Works with most cars. Take control of your car's health today! Just Use VD30 Pro Car Diagnostic Scanner Solve All Problems ! NOTE: DIESEL VEHICLES NOT SUPPORTED such as Ducato 2.8JTD, Opel Movano B 2.5CDTI, Sprinter 311 CDI, Master II 2.5 dCi​, Kangoo 1.5 dCi​, Vito W638 2.2CDI​. Check compatibility with your vehicle model before purchasing.
